title: Never Trust a Number the Model Gives You
description: Write a validator that catches when the model's claimed number disagrees with the source data.
problem: Write validate_profit_claim(claimed_business, claimed_profit, csv_text) that returns True only if the claim matches the real CSV data within 1% tolerance.
